productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Speed Boat Grey Sports Shoes
description: Walk along the coast line or indulge in an adventurous day of yatching in these Speed Boat shoes from adidas. Team these with shorts and tees for a day of nautical fun.UpperSynthetic textile uppers with synthetic tape overlays for better structure and comfortPerforations on parts of the forefoot and sides for better water drainageadidas patented 3-Stripe overlays on the sides for enhanced support and to exude the brand’s belief in performance Speed lacing system with a doggle for faster lacingTongue with rubber edging for a snug FitContoured, stretch heel cup for added comfortPull loop to enable easier pulling off of the shoesBrand name printed on the heel and engraved on the rubber tongue extensionMisoleInsole with a bold splatter pattern stitched to the footbed so that it stays in placePhylon midsole provides lightweight comfortOutsoleNon-marking TRAXION® outsole provides exceptional traction in wet conditionsDrainage ports at the bottom of the outsoleshoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlightWalk along the coast line or indulge in an adventurous day of yatching in these Speed Boat shoes from Adidas.
